summary: Graph bootstrap: add 219 transcendental-magic chunk nodes + BELONGS_TO edges
description:
Back up the DB first (scripts/backup_db.sh), then python3 scripts/graph_bootstrap.py --dry-run to confirm it is incremental: expect exactly the 219 new chunk nodes + BELONGS_TO(western_esoteric) edges for transcendental-magic-doctrine/-ritual, zero changes to existing nodes/edges. Then run for real.

Also update docs/summary/work-grouping.md: the transcendental-magic row and header caveat say 'not yet in DB' — amend to reflect bootstrap (embed still pending).

Done: node/edge counts before/after recorded in close note; chunk node count for the two texts = 219; existing counts unchanged; census caveat updated and committed.
